stemHtml:
Refer to figure. 
Regarding the FMS multifunction control display unit (MCDU) display shown in the annex. Which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: Rectangular boxes indicate compulsory information that must be filled before proceeding.
options.b: Dashed lines indicate compulsory information that must be filled before proceeding.
options.c: You can proceed to the next page without filling any field.
options.d: Both dashed lines and rectangular box indicate compulsory information.
